title: Things to know before your visit.
subtitle: Have a question? Find quick answers below or reach out to us directly.

items.question: What are your operating hours?
items.answer: We are open every day from 1:00 PM to 1:00 AM. Whether it's a late lunch or a midnight craving, we've got you covered.

items.question: Do you have vegetarian options?
items.answer: Absolutely! We have extensive veg and vegan options available. Our menu caters to all dietary preferences including pure vegetarian meals.

items.question: Is the place suitable for kids?
items.answer: Yes, we are a family-friendly dhaba. The outdoor setting surrounded by trees makes it a great experience for children.

items.question: Do you offer home delivery?
items.answer: Yes, we provide home delivery service within Tiptur and surrounding areas. Call us at +91 94816 00080 to place your order.

items.question: What payment methods are accepted?
items.answer: We accept debit cards and NFC mobile payments in addition to cash. UPI payments are also welcome.

items.question: Is there parking available?
items.answer: Yes! We have a good parking area for both two-wheelers and four-wheelers. Multiple reviewers have praised our spacious parking lot.

items.question: Do you have outdoor seating?
items.answer: Yes, outdoor seating is one of our highlights. The dhaba is surrounded by trees and plants, offering a natural and peaceful dining experience.

items.question: Is it good for groups and tourists?
items.answer: Absolutely. We regularly host groups and tourists. Our casual, quiet atmosphere with ample seating makes it ideal for larger parties.
